title: Supervise natural mating of livestock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Supervise natural mating of livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare animals for breeding

pcs.text: Access and confirm workplace breeding program requirements and relevant animal data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access and confirm workplace breeding program requirements and relevant animal data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and confirm workplace breeding program requirements and relevant animal data.

pcs.text: Determine sire fertility status prior to joining where applicable
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine sire fertility status prior to joining where applicable?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine sire fertility status prior to joining where applicable.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks while working with livestock according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks while working with livestock according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks while working with livestock according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Identify and prepare joining areas using a range of selection factors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and prepare joining areas using a range of selection factors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and prepare joining areas using a range of selection factors.

pcs.text: Handle animals safely and humanely to minimise stress and discomfort according to industry and workplace animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle animals safely and humanely to minimise stress and discomfort according to industry and workplace animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle animals safely and humanely to minimise stress and discomfort according to industry and workplace animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Draft animals according to mating plan and in appropriate ratios to encourage optimum mating
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Draft animals according to mating plan and in appropriate ratios to encourage optimum mating?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Draft animals according to mating plan and in appropriate ratios to encourage optimum mating.

pcs.text: Determine and meet sire requirements in advance of mating
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and meet sire requirements in advance of mating?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and meet sire requirements in advance of mating.

pcs.text: Prepare and examine animals for mating
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and examine animals for mating?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and examine animals for mating.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare animals for breeding

elements.title: Implement breeding program and monitor mating

pcs.text: Access veterinary advice according to animal needs, workplace requirements and industry practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access veterinary advice according to animal needs, workplace requirements and industry practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access veterinary advice according to animal needs, workplace requirements and industry practice.

pcs.text: Identify and schedule dates and timing of breeding
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and schedule dates and timing of breeding?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and schedule dates and timing of breeding.

pcs.text: Carry out physical examination of animals to evaluate health and welfare status of animals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out physical examination of animals to evaluate health and welfare status of animals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out physical examination of animals to evaluate health and welfare status of animals.

pcs.text: Observe behaviour of animals during joining to identify necessity of intervention and assistance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe behaviour of animals during joining to identify necessity of intervention and assistance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe behaviour of animals during joining to identify necessity of intervention and assistance.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide assistance as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide assistance as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Implement breeding program and monitor mating

elements.title: Complete breeding program

pcs.text: Remove sires from herd, mob or flock where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove sires from herd, mob or flock where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove sires from herd, mob or flock where required.

pcs.text: Arrange for pregnancy testing to determine the effectiveness of joining
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Arrange for pregnancy testing to determine the effectiveness of joining?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange for pregnancy testing to determine the effectiveness of joining.

pcs.text: Record and document data to develop history of mating performance and outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and document data to develop history of mating performance and outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and document data to develop history of mating performance and outcomes.

pcs.text: Research industry information of emerging and prevailing practices and compare with workplace practice to recommend future improvements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research industry information of emerging and prevailing practices and compare with workplace practice to recommend future improvements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research industry information of emerging and prevailing practices and compare with workplace practice to recommend future improvements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete breeding program

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
